raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to you in desperate need of assistance. I have been calling citibank customer service since XX/XX/year>, trying to resolve a {$890.00} refund which was refunded by XXXX but customer service put it on my promotional balance instead. 

Its now showing on my account balance and since then I have been requesting them to remove it as it was already refunded, I shouldnt have to pay that and it shouldn't have to be added to my balance. It messed up my credit score and I tried to file a complaint but they just tossing me back and forth, wait 7-10 business day, 10-14 business day, 60-90 business day. 

Here I am 6 months later, still following up. Can I please get someone to help me, not some customer service overseas that doesn't care and don't know what they are doing.
